title: Primal Apocalypse
description: Survive in a world surrounded by dinosaurs, but very different from the usual... With firearms and new technologies!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PRIMAL_APOCALYPSE/MP_PRIMAL_APOCALYPSE_Header.webp) Damn Mike, who left the dinosaur fence gates open? What are we going to do now!! The world is teeming with dinosaurs... We'd better get our firearms, and get ready to fight them, but what if we capture them again, maybe we can put them back in, and keep extracting the DNA from the missing dinosaurs! ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PRIMAL_APOCALYPSE/MP_PRIMAL_APOCALYPSE_Description.webp) This is not just another dinosaur modpack for all the right reasons... In which dinosaur modpack have you seen technology, firearms, missiles...? In this case, we are in a modern world, but with dinosaurs! - The main dinosaur mod is Unusual Prehistory, which adds a complex DNA system, besides allowing us to set the dinosaurs natural spawn locations. - Terralith will modify the terrain, along with Geophilic or Ecologics, among others. - Timeless and Classics Zero is the new firearms mod that will not leave you indifferent. Ready to attack from a distance? - You will need to hide from the dinosaurs, as well as prepare rooms from which they cannot escape, so Security Craft has been added! Moreover, it is a perfect modpack for multiplayer. - And there is still a lot to discover, enemies, animals, structures... And quests! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PRIMAL_APOCALYPSE/MP_PRIMAL_APOCALYPSE_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 0.8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2aYpy0RH/images/6ebf64726fe3facab99735b1a7576142f8c7fc80.jpeg) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2aYpy0RH/images/f7f16157b01a02f0d32247aea2e7ca73f9958093.jpeg) ![Screnshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2aYpy0RH/images/3e9ae94732842afd9f831a4711dafe57ca13b4fe.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2aYpy0RH/images/8c6b94c060c60b575492b65405897a8314a7ddf2.png)
